description: Returns a lite user profile object by user ID.

output.description: Lite user profile with identity, country, level, and account status.

fields.username: string — display name (also present as login)
fields.country: string — countryId the user belongs to
fields.xp: number — experience points (also present as experience)

notes: username and login are both present and hold the same value. xp and experience are both present and hold the same value. The infos object contains account status flags.
